message:
feat(frankenterm/main): tick 237 start storage-write surface — 3 sites cx-first (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Starts the storage-write surface migration in main.rs. After the
storage-read surface closed (tick 236, 11 sites), storage writes
(`record_*`, `upsert_*`, `insert_*`, `delete_*`) are the next
batch. main.rs has ~15+ sites; this tick migrates 3 to establish
the pattern:

1. L6959 read/search audit helper:
   `storage.record_audit_action_redacted_with_cx(&storage_cx, record)`
   Routes through tick-176's send_with_cx mpsc backpressure path.

2. L15958 watcher event-bus ingest:
   `storage.record_event_with_cx(&storage_cx, stored_event)`
   Same cx-first write path.

3. L17412 robot send audit:
   `storage.record_audit_action_redacted_with_cx(&storage_cx, audit_record)`

Standard `Cx::current().unwrap_or_else(for_request)` pattern with
locally-scoped `storage_cx` binding.

Verification: `cargo check -p frankenterm --bin ft` compiles clean
via fork bypass (CC=llvm clang, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ft-rusticmaple-target).

Remaining storage-write sites in main.rs (~12):
- L18736, L18835, L18937, L19006 (event annotation audits)
- L24514 (human send audit)
- L25752, L25825, L25899, L25947 (workflow-related)
- L26682 (prepare audit)
- L21907, L22803, L23395, L24105, L24180 (accounts/saved-search/bookmark CRUD)

Future ticks continue the batch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
